body_txt: Within an episode (or a chapter or a scene), someone is born or a pregnancy is revealed and someone else dies, emphasizing the cycle of life. A Super-Trope to Death by Childbirth , but includes all the cases where the death is not the mother, as well as those where it is . The Phoenix is a symbol of the motif. Also a form of Ironic Juxtaposition . Compare Babies Ever After , Dead Guy Junior , Someone to Remember Him By , Coming and Going (where someone might be conceived ), and Life/Death Juxtaposition (where the general concept of "life" is juxtaposed with that of "death"). See also Died on Their Birthday , where a character's death takes place on the anniversary of their own birth, and Wedding/Death Juxtaposition , where death occurs close to a wedding, juxtaposing happiness and sadness.
